{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323172357DC04CCAE92AA1CDF1D2A"}"},"total":1146},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528242321830806296","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，好看，菩提老祖真的太可爱了","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"菩提老祖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8F%A9%E6%8F%90%E8%80%81%E7%A5%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742578381CDF1D2A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227528242321830806296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227423263871793630232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8F%A9%E6%8F%90%E8%80%81%E7%A5%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752808652,"group_id":"7423263871793630232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热爱于高质小说…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2zvGh3JY1yhrdXHFIWMJyM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/47a5954e18cf494da115167a40cbce91~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795232&x-signature=ORNV94Py3Pwu2YfhOoDp5TSfEpg%3D","user_id":"457823251602029","user_name":"高质书迷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"457823251602029","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423263871793630232","book_info":{"abstract":"叶鸣穿越到斩神世界，成了菩提老祖的代理人！
神墟【三教法会】，能言出法随！
开局习得大品天仙诀，力大无比、五感超神、悟性绝顶。
后又练成身外化身、法天象地……等诸般神通。
只要完成老祖给的考验，更是能融合老祖留在这个世界的化身，登顶至高。
老祖说：“此界，外神猖獗，当尽诛之！”
……
许久后，叶鸣经常卡神墟BUG，频频作死，老祖吹胡子瞪眼。
老祖：“独气气不如众气气。”
遂赠予方寸宝阁，阁中物品需气人才能获得。
自此，叶鸣在气人的道路上，一骑绝尘。
……
前情提要：
在本作里叶梵将一直当总司令到结局。
胖胖会跟莫莉，在后期会有所发展。
老祖会去病院见猴子，悟空三兄弟也将在林七夜的时代重逢……
更多精彩，邀您来看。
……
本书为斩神同人三部曲第一部。
第二部《斩神：我都至高了，系统你才来？》已完结，30万字+。
